target.rawSql: SELECT opened_ts AS time, 'fleet coordinated drift' AS text FROM incidents WHERE fleet = true AND opened_ts > now() - interval '6 hours'

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(DISTINCT client_id) FROM feature_windows WHERE window_start > now() - interval '15 minutes'

SELECT CASE level WHEN 0 THEN 'ALLOW' WHEN 1 THEN 'WATCH' WHEN 2 THEN 'THROTTLE' WHEN 3 THEN 'QUARANTINE' WHEN 4 THEN 'KICK' END AS level, count(*) AS count FROM verdict_history WHERE ts > now() - interval '1 hour' GROUP BY level ORDER BY level
SELECT fw.window_start AS time, c.client_id, fw.trust FROM feature_windows fw JOIN clients c ON c.id = fw.client_id WHERE fw.window_start > now() - interval '6 hours' ORDER BY fw.window_start
SELECT window_start AS time, avg(fleet) AS fleet_component FROM feature_windows WHERE window_start > now() - interval '6 hours' GROUP BY window_start ORDER BY window_start
